Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches relevant technical skills (SAP, Tableau, Power BI) for employment (Target 4.4). It also emphasizes understanding ethics, social responsibility, and sustainability issues (Core Competence B, aligning with Target 4.7).

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course directly addresses technological upgrading and innovation through SAP, blockchain, RPA, AI, and data analysis tools, enhancing economic productivity (Target 8.2) and problem-solving skills (Core Competence D).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core content revolves around accounting information systems, ERP (SAP S/4HANA), data analytics, and emerging technologies (blockchain, RPA, AI), directly enhancing technological capabilities and innovation in industry (Target 9.5).

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course covers production cycle management (PP module) for efficiency (Target 12.2) and XBRL for integrating sustainability information into corporate reporting (Target 12.6), supported by the core competence of understanding sustainability issues.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's focus on XBRL financial reporting tools for listed companies promotes transparency and accountability, directly contributing to effective and transparent institutions (Target 16.6) and indirectly to reducing corruption (Target 16.5).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's emphasis on data analysis tools (Excel, Tableau, Power BI) and XBRL technology enhances capacity for reliable data (Target 17.18) and knowledge sharing through technology (Target 17.6).
